Y Tu Mamá También

Y tu mamá también

"Life has its ways of teaching."

7.4
2001MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

In Mexico, two teenage boys and an attractive older woman embark on a road trip and learn a thing or two about life, friendship, sex, and each other.

Tags

friendshipadolescencebeachmexicogroup sexmale friendshiproad tripcoming of agetravelhuman relationshipnew mexican cinemaself reflectionself-reflexiveroadtripsexual discovery
